chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2236 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) Hearing of Case 1. For order on Misc. No. 18927/2023 2. For order on Misc. No. 13729/2023 3. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Petitioner present in person. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. The prayer clause in this petition are as follows:- “1. To direct Ministry of Law and Defence to take action as per law against Rana Sanaullah the Interior Minister under the ‘Investigation for Fair Trial Act/2013 and the Contempt of Court Ordinance 2013’. 2. To declare the Interior Minister Rana Sanaullah in his ‘Personal Capacity as not Sadiq and Ameen’ thus ‘Disqualified from being a member of Parliament under Article 62 r/w 63 of the Constitution for ‘Misusing his Authority’ for ‘Illegal Surveillance and Recordings’ and for ‘Publicizing the same’. The Article 225 of the Constitution is very clear and in view hereof no case is made out for direct recourse under writ jurisdiction. This petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
